framework_info.description: Generic database syntax helpers - DO NOT MODIFY
framework_info.purpose: Provides database-specific SQL syntax for any SQL database

sql_hints: Use DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL n MONTH/DAY/YEAR) for date arithmetic
Use CONCAT(field1, ' ', field2) for string concatenation
Use LIMIT n for result limiting
Use IFNULL(field, default) for null handling
Use DATE_FORMAT() for date formatting
Use NOW() - INTERVAL 'n months/days/years' for date arithmetic
Use field1 || ' ' || field2 for string concatenation
Use LIMIT n for result limiting
Use COALESCE(field, default) for null handling
Use TO_CHAR() for date formatting
Use datetime('now', '-n months/days/years') for date arithmetic
Use field1 || ' ' || field2 for string concatenation
Use LIMIT n for result limiting
Use IFNULL(field, default) for null handling
Use strftime() for date formatting
Use DATEADD(MONTH/DAY/YEAR, -n, GETDATE()) for date arithmetic
Use field1 + ' ' + field2 for string concatenation
Use TOP n for result limiting
Use ISNULL(field, default) for null handling
Use FORMAT() for date formatting
Use SYSDATE - INTERVAL 'n' MONTH/DAY/YEAR for date arithmetic
Use field1 || ' ' || field2 for string concatenation
Use ROWNUM <= n for result limiting
Use NVL(field, default) for null handling
Use TO_CHAR() for date formatting
